hero.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
hero.subtitle: Expert in Vue.js, React.js, TypeScript & Robust Frontend Architecture

about.title: About Me
about.text: Results-driven Senior Frontend Engineer with 6+ years of experience in designing, building, and scaling high-load web applications, enterprise dashboards, and Web3/P2P platforms. Expert in Vue.js (2/3), Nuxt.js, React.js, and Next.js, with a heavy focus on TypeScript and robust frontend architecture. Adept at accelerating development workflows using advanced AI-assisted tools (Claude, Gemini) for architecture validation and code analysis.

photography.name: Photography
photography.description: I enjoy capturing moments and turning everyday scenes into visual stories. It helps me stay creative and notice details—a mindset that carries into my work as a developer.

traveling.name: Traveling
traveling.description: Traveling inspires me with new perspectives and cultures. Whether it's mountains or cities, I love exploring places that challenge my routine and spark curiosity.

videoGames.name: Video Games
videoGames.description: A source of creative inspiration and relaxation. I especially enjoy story-driven games and immersive worlds that blend art, logic, and interaction.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.text: Open to interesting projects and collaboration.

achievements: Migrated a core enterprise application from Vue 2 (Options API) to Vue 3 (Composition API) and TypeScript, reducing codebase size by 25%, improving type safety, and cutting feature time-to-market by 30%.
Designed and implemented core architecture for a high-load P2P cryptocurrency marketplace, leveraging WebSockets to achieve sub-100ms low-latency real-time data synchronization.
Engineered a scalable, enterprise-grade UI Component Library documented via Storybook and mapped 1:1 to the Figma design system, boosting cross-team development efficiency by 40%.
Configured and optimized Webpack/Vite build pipelines with code-splitting and lazy-loading, improving Google Web Vitals (LCP, FID) and accelerating initial page load time by 35%.
Integrated LLMs (Claude & Gemini) into the engineering workflow, accelerating complex refactoring, automated debugging, and architectural research while maintaining strict verification protocols.
Led peer code reviews and mentored junior/mid-level developers, establishing code quality standards and standardizing architectural patterns.
Architected the foundational frontend boilerplate for a new SaaS product using Next.js, React, and TypeScript, establishing strict ESLint/Prettier configs.
Developed an interactive 3D product showcase using Three.js and custom scroll-driven animations, improving user engagement metrics by 45%.
Built pixel-perfect, highly responsive layouts with rich UI interactions based on complex Figma specifications.
Designed and structured the application logic for a high-load, data-heavy survey platform, using Nuxt.js for SSR and optimal SEO indexing.
Delivered 100% accessible (WCAG-compliant) UI layouts, integrating semantic HTML and ARIA attributes to expand audience reach.
Developed fault-tolerant, state-managed UI components using Vue 3 and Pinia, decreasing browser memory consumption by 20%.
Shipped scalable, modular UI solutions for complex enterprise ERP software, reducing tech debt and speeding up integration times by 15%.
Built blockchain-integrated web interfaces (Web3) using React.js and TypeScript, creating secure frontend layers for smart contract interaction (Ethers.js/Web3.js).
Optimized dApp state management and error handling for failed transactions, improving successful checkout rates by 18%.
Created advanced custom 3D animations (canvas-based 3D ring visualizer) and scroll-driven UI elements, elevating digital brand presence.
Integrated third-party logistics (DHL) and social APIs (VK) within the NetCat CMS framework, automating order tracking.

p2pMarketplace.name: P2P Crypto Marketplace
p2pMarketplace.description: Core architecture of a high-load P2P cryptocurrency marketplace at emcd.io — WebSockets-driven real-time data sync with sub-100ms latency, built on Vue 3 and TypeScript.

showcase3d.name: Interactive 3D Showcase
showcase3d.description: Three.js product showcase with custom scroll-driven animations for the WSender SaaS — user engagement up 45%.

uiKit.name: Enterprise UI Kit
uiKit.description: Scalable component library documented in Storybook and mapped 1:1 to the Figma design system — cross-team efficiency up 40%.

surveyPlatform.name: High-load Survey Platform
surveyPlatform.description: Data-heavy survey platform on Nuxt.js with SSR, SEO indexing and a fully WCAG-compliant accessible UI.

terrainGenerator.name: Procedural Terrain Generator
terrainGenerator.description: Interactive 3D landscape on Vue 3 + Three.js: fractional Brownian motion over Simplex noise, real-time terrain controls, four biome presets and dynamic day/night lighting with a wireframe tech aesthetic.

github.title: More on GitHub
github.text: Open-source experiments and pet projects live here.

contactSection.title: Let's build something great
contactSection.text: Open to interesting projects, collaborations and good conversations. The fastest ways to reach me:

aiTwin.title: Alex's AI Twin
aiTwin.subtitle: Online — usually replies instantly
aiTwin.greeting: Hi! I'm Alex's AI twin. Ask me about his skills, experience or hobbies — or use the quick questions below.

quick.skills: What are Alex's key Vue 3 skills?
quick.emcd: Tell me about his experience at emcd.io

answers.skills: Alex has 6+ years with Vue: Vue 3 Composition API, TypeScript, Pinia and Nuxt. At emcd.io he migrated a large enterprise app from Vue 2 to Vue 3 — 25% less code and 30% faster feature delivery.
answers.emcd: At emcd.io (Feb 2024 — now) Alex designed the core architecture of a high-load P2P crypto marketplace with sub-100ms WebSockets sync, built an enterprise UI kit documented in Storybook and mapped 1:1 to Figma, and integrated Claude & Gemini into the team's engineering workflow.
answers.hobby: Outside of code Alex is into photography, traveling and story-driven video games — he says they train the same eye for detail that frontend work needs.
answers.fallback: Good question! For now I'm a demo twin running on mock data. For anything deeper, ping the real Alex on Telegram or by email — links are in the contact section.
answers.error: Something went wrong while sending your message. Please try again.
answers.rateLimited: I've hit the free usage limit for now — please try again in a minute, or reach Alex directly via the contact section below.
